200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Each attack of the Arbiter casts a mark on the target of the attack for 10 sec. Marked enemies take 3% more damage for each mark they have. Each unit can have up to 5 marks.

description 4/6

Each attack of the Arbiter casts a mark on the target of the attack for 10 sec. Marked enemies take 5% more damage for each mark they have. Each unit can have up to 5 marks. For the duration of the battle, the damage dealt to Arbiter is reduced by 10% for each living enemy mage on the battlefield. If there are no living enemy mages left on the battlefield, the damage dealt to Arbiter is reduced by 30%. When an enemy mage dies, Arbiter restores 15% of own max health.

description 6/6

Each attack of the Arbiter casts a mark on the target of the attack for 10 sec. Marked enemies take 10% more damage for each mark they have. Each unit can have up to 5 marks. For the duration of the battle, the damage dealt to Arbiter is reduced by 15% for each living enemy mage on the battlefield. If there are no living enemy mages left on the battlefield, the damage dealt to Arbiter is reduced by 40%. When an enemy mage dies, Arbiter restores 20% of own max health. Once in a while, Arbiter curses all enemy mages. If there are no enemy mages, Arbiter instead curses 3 random enemies. The curse lasts for 10 sec. Every second for 10 sec, the cursed units take pure damage equal to 200% of the Arbiter’s attack. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce the target’s incoming damage. Also, When the targets are hit, they have a 30% chance to turn to stone for 11 sec. During this time, they can’t move, and they take 35% more damage. Arbiter restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt by this ability. If a cursed unit uses a weapon ability, that unit takes pure damage equal to 300% of the Arbiter’s attack. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce the target’s incoming damage. Arbiter restores health equal to 80% of the damage dealt by this ability.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Whenever Arbiter casts a mark on an enemy, a random enemy (preferred target: mages) takes physical damage equal to 10% of Arbiter’s max health.

description 4/6

Whenever Arbiter casts a mark on an enemy, a random enemy (preferred target: mages) takes physical damage equal to 10% of Arbiter’s max health. For the duration of the battle, Arbiter’s damage is increased by 10% for each living enemy mage on the battlefield, the Arbiter’s damage is increased by 30%.

description 6/6

Whenever Arbiter casts a mark on an enemy, a random enemy (preferred target: mages) takes physical damage equal to 10% of Arbiter’s max health. For the duration of the battle, Arbiter’s damage is increased by 10% for each living enemy mage on the battlefield, the Arbiter’s damage is increased by 30%. Whenever Arbiter turns enemies to stone with a set ability, Arbiter also deals pure damage to that enemy equal to 10% of own max health.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Whenever Arbiter attacks a marked target, Arbiter restores 5% of own health. When Arbiter attacks a unit with 5 marks, each attack restores additionally 8% of the unit’s max health.

description 4/6

Whenever Arbiter attacks a marked target, Arbiter restores 5% of own health. When Arbiter attacks a unit with 5 marks, each attack restores additionally 8% of the unit’s max health. Whenever an enemy mages dies on the battlefield, Arbiter increases own physical and magic armor by 65% for 6 sec.

description 6/6

Whenever Arbiter attacks a marked target, Arbiter restores 5% of own health. When Arbiter attacks a unit with 5 marks, each attack restores additionally 8% of the unit’s max health. Whenever an enemy mages dies on the battlefield, Arbiter increases own physical and magic armor by 65% for 6 sec. When the Arbiter curses enemies, the unit also gains a shield that absorbs 25% damage of any type for 65 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When 5 marks are cast, Arbiter increases own max health by 10% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

description 4/6

When 5 marks are cast, Arbiter increases own max health by 10% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. In addition to decreasing incoming damage, Arbiter also increases incomoing and outgoing healing by 10% for every living mage on the battlefield. If there are no living enemy mages left on the battlefield, the Arbiter’s incoming and outgoing healing is increased by 30%. Whenever an enemy mage dies, Arbiter increases own max health by 15% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

description 6/6

When 5 marks are cast, Arbiter increases own max health by 10% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. In addition to decreasing incoming damage, Arbiter also increases incomoing and outgoing healing by 10% for every living mage on the battlefield. If there are no living enemy mages left on the battlefield, the Arbiter’s incoming and outgoing healing is increased by 30%. Whenever an enemy mage dies, Arbiter increases own max health by 15% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Whenever Arbiter turns enemies to stone with a set ability, the unit removes 2 random debuffs from themself.

Materials

Glass of Milk
Eagle of Valor
